batches.title: Canonical runtime, execution and durable state cutover
batches.objective: Cut over to one packaged, durable, exactly simulated and finalized runtime vertical.

batches.title: Provider and protocol conformance with pinned external truth
batches.objective: Prove provider/protocol contracts with credentialed fixtures and deployment evidence.

batches.title: Real operational evidence, hardened deployment and reviewed canary
batches.objective: Produce real operational evidence and a hardened, human-reviewed canary boundary.
